name: Cream Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a temperature suitable for light crust baking.
2. If desired, add chocolate chips, raisins, or other dried fruits at the beep.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased bread pan and bake according to your recipe's instructions.
5. Turn off the oven when the bread is cooked through.
6. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving. Enjoy!
